title: Postilion Portal User Account Management
checks: Verify ICT Operations Staff with Postilion admin rights available
Confirm Line Management approver available via User Access Form
Validate Card Operations Manager as business owner
Check Internal Audit available for periodic access review
Confirm completed User Access Form approved by Line Management
Verify role requirements defined and validated
recommended_actions: Portal access URL: http://192.168.0.225:8080/portal/Login.faces (case-sensitive)
Requirements: Admin credentials required
User creation: Login to Postilion Portal as Administrator
User creation: Navigate to: Employees → Add an Employee
User creation: Capture personal details as per User Access Form
User creation: Click Save
User creation: Select Enrol Portal Access
User creation: Create username using convention: <first_letter_of_first_name><surname> (e.g., MMoyo)
User creation: Set temporary password
User creation: Click Enroll
User creation: Navigate to: Roles and Permissions → Manage Roles
User creation: Assign approved role
User creation: Click Save
Role assignment rules: Contact Centre access level: Transaction viewing only
Role assignment rules: Administrator access level: Full system access
Role assignment rules: Supervisor access level: Approval and supervisory rights
Role assignment rules: Reports Only access level: Read-only reporting access
Password reset: Login to Postilion Portal as Administrator
Password reset: Navigate to: Employees → Find an Employee
Password reset: Search user by name
Password reset: Select user → Access tab
Password reset: Click Reset Portal Password
Password reset: Set temporary password
Password reset: Confirm user is forced to change password on first login
Account unlocking: Navigate to: Employees → Find an Employee
Account unlocking: Select user → Access tab
Account unlocking: Click Portal Unlock
Account unlocking: Confirm user can log in with existing password
Account disable/block: Navigate to: Employees → Find an Employee
Account disable/block: Select user
Account disable/block: Click Disable User or Disable Portal Access
Account deletion: Navigate to: Employees → Find an Employee
Account deletion: Select checkbox next to user
Account deletion: Click Delete
Account deletion: Confirm deletion
Verification: User can log in with temporary credentials
Verification: Forced password change occurs on first login
Verification: Assigned roles enforce correct permissions
Verification: Audit trail entries recorded for access actions
notes: Username format: First letter of first name + Surname
Assigned roles must align strictly with job responsibilities
Account disabling is preferred over deletion for auditability
Regular review of active portal users is mandatory
Temporary passwords should follow complexity requirements
Security controls: Unique username convention enforced
Security controls: Temporary passwords with mandatory change on first login
Security controls: Role-based access control (RBAC)
Security controls: Account lockout after repeated failed login attempts
Security controls: Periodic access reviews conducted
Escalation path Level 1: ICT Operations (routine user administration)
Escalation path Level 2: Card Operations Team (role and access validation)
Escalation path Level 3: Head ICT (policy or exception handling)
Escalation path Level 4: Internal Audit (compliance and audit findings)
Documentation: Approved User Access Form
Documentation: Role assignment records
Documentation: Password reset logs
Documentation: Account enable/disable history
Documentation: User deletion audit trail
Compliance requirements: PCI-DSS compliance for card data access
Compliance requirements: Segregation of duties enforced
Compliance requirements: Regular user access reviews
Compliance requirements: Complete and immutable audit trail maintained
